steps: Log in or create a Netlify account at https://app.netlify.com/signup
Scroll to the 'Personal access tokens' section
Enter a descriptive name for the token
Copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Personal Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Netlify personal access token used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier available with generous limits for personal projects
The token is only shown once — store it securely immediately after generation
Tokens can have configurable expiration dates for enhanced security
Used as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' in API requests

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's account details
